name: Kemono-Downloader
desc: Kemono pawchive Downloader is a fast, powerful PyQt5 app for archiving content from a wide array of sites, including Kemono, Coomer, Bunkr, Erome, Saint2.su, n…
descFull: Kemono pawchive Downloader is a fast, powerful PyQt5 app for archiving content from a wide array of sites, including Kemono, Coomer, Bunkr, Erome, Saint2.su, nhentai, and Discord. It features a Creator Browser, update checker, and supports multi-threaded, multi-part downloads. Sessions can pause, resume, or recover. Advanced filters
